title: Ant Control in Ardsley, NY | $350–$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional ant control services in Ardsley, Westchester. Eliminate carpenter ants, pavement ants & more. Licensed exterminators. Call today for $350–$550 service!
intro: Dealing with an ant infestation in your Ardsley home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive ant control services throughout Ardsley and Westchester County, with proven solutions starting at just $350–$550. Our experienced technicians use targeted treatments to eliminate ant colonies at the source and prevent future invasions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Ardsley residents for years with same-day and next-day service options. Our licensed exterminators understand the specific ant species common to Westchester County and use safe, effective treatments tailored to your property's unique needs.
localContext: Ardsley's beautiful tree-lined streets and historic homes, from the charming neighborhoods near Pascone Park to properties along the Saw Mill River Parkway, can attract various ant species including carpenter ants and odorous house ants. The village's mix of older Tudor and Colonial-style homes and modern residences requires specialized pest control approaches that protect your property's integrity while eliminating infestations.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Ardsley homes?
faqs.answer: Ardsley properties commonly experience carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and acrobat ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in older Ardsley homes. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment method.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide ant control service in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Ardsley residents in most cases. Our team understands that ant infestations can escalate quickly, especially during warmer months, so we prioritize rapid response times throughout Westchester County to address your pest control needs promptly.

faqs.question: What does the $350–$550 ant control service include?
faqs.answer: Our ant control service includes a thorough property inspection, identification of ant species and entry points, targeted interior and exterior treatments, colony elimination at the source, and follow-up recommendations. The final price depends on your property size, infestation severity, and the specific treatment methods required for complete elimination.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for families and pets in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We take extra care in residential areas and can discuss low-toxicity or eco-friendly treatment options that are particularly suitable for homes with children, pets, or sensitive individuals.
